Dental Services

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1650652625020{padding-bottom: 4% !important;}” el_class=”medium-p”]With a range of dental services and treatment options, we have solutions for the whole family. You won’t feel rushed or pressured during visits. Our team takes the time to understand your unique concerns and preferences and we tailor our care to fit your needs.

[/vc_column_text][nectar_btn size=”jumbo” button_style=”regular” button_color_2=”Accent-Color” icon_family=”default_arrow” text=”Request An Appointment” Complete Dental Care for the Whole Family

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_spacing=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]At Carolina Oaks Dental Care, we’re passionate about offering high quality, comprehensive, full-scope dentistry for the entire family. Our Clemson, SC dentists have the knowledge and training to provide the common dental treatments you’d expect from a general dentist, as well as more complex procedures and techniques normally associated with specialists. This ensures we can take care of all of your dental needs under one roof.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_spacing=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]Our support team in the front office and clinical areas prioritize patient satisfaction, and we all work together in harmony to maintain a stress-free, relaxing environment for everyone who walks through our door. We treat our patients with respect and compassion and truly care about what’s in their best interest. You’ll only get the treatment you need and you can feel confident you’re receiving expert recommendations, advice and care. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type=”full_width_background” full_screen_row_position=”middle” column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_border_style=”solid” gradient_type=”default”][vc_column_text]

Cosmetic Dentistry

  • Cosmetic Dentistry Overview
  • Teeth Whitening
  • Veneers

When you’re unhappy with the appearance of your teeth, it can have a big impact on your life. You might find yourself avoiding social situations or hiding your smile. The good news is, you don’t have to settle. We offer full-service cosmetic dentistry in Clemson, SC. Our dentists combine dental expertise with artistry to give you a smile you love and the confidence that comes with it. If you’re interested in improving the shape, color and/or alignment of your teeth, schedule a visit with us to learn more about our cosmetic dental procedures.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”padding-4-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_spacing=”default” background_color=”#ffffff” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”10px” column_link_target=”_self” advanced_gradient_angle=”0″ gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” gradient_type=”default”][vc_column_text]

Preventive & General Dental Care

  • Emergency Dentistry
  • Family Dentistry
  • Occlusal Guards
  • Dentistry for Kids

By attending dental checkups and cleanings twice a year, you’ll keep your mouth free of disease and pain. If issues are spotted at a routine visit, we can treat them in their earliest stages while they’re still easy and affordable to fix. These appointments also give your Clemson, SC general dentist an opportunity to provide you with personalized recommendations to optimize your homecare. If you do experience a problem or pain that doesn’t subside in between checkups, we’ll schedule you for an exam as soon as possible and diagnose and treat the issue to get your oral health back on track.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”padding-4-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_spacing=”default” background_color=”#ffffff” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”10px” column_link_target=”_self” advanced_gradient_angle=”0″ gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” gradient_type=”default”][vc_column_text]

Restorative & Prosthetic Dental Care

  • Bridges
  • Crowns
  • Dental Implant Restorations
  • Root Canals
  • Full Dentures
  • Partial Dentures
  • Dental Extractions

When decay, gum disease or injury cause a problem, our dentists are on hand with the skills and expertise necessary to administer comfortable, contemporary restorative and prosthetic dental care, ranging from fillings to dental bridges. Our goal is to help you retain your natural teeth for life – and if that is not an option, we offer a range of teeth replacement options. Our dentists use modern tools and techniques, as well as materials that mimic natural tissues, to heal and restore your dental health in the most aesthetic way possible.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_column_text]

We Are Accepting New Patients Now

Our experts provide the high quality, compassionate dental care you and your family deserve. We pride ourselves in helping our patients improve or maintain their oral health in a comfortable, relaxed setting. Located in Clemson, SC, Carolina Oaks Dental Care serves all ages. We are currently accepting new patients and look forward to meeting you. Call us at 864-654-6700 to schedule an appointment.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
